html:
Exclusive to:

ExamineAccomplishAchievement

The Accomploshrine is a craftable structure only available on the console versions of Don't Starve. It requires 10 Gold Nuggets, 1 Cut Stone, and 6 Gears to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

Willow attaining the "...and despair!" achievement.

The Accomploshrine's sole purpose is to grant two PSN/Xbox achievements. To attain the trophies, the player must first build the Accomploshrine to earn the "Look on my works, ye Mighty," achievement, then activate the Accomploshrine a total of 725 times within one game to earn the "...and despair!" achievement.

Each time the player turns the handle on the device, the cranking sound will play at a higher and higher pitch until the 25th crank. After every 25th activation, the shrine will release a firework with a similar light effect as Lightning, and the player's character will remark on their accomplishment. When the player obtains the "...and despair!" achievement, a bigger fireworks explosion, flags, and music will come out of the Accomploshrine, and the character will comment again on their achievement.

Trivia

  • Klei did not want to add any sort of achievements for Don't Starve, but Sony required them to do so for the PS4 release. This item was added begrudgingly as a jab at the pointlessness of achievements.[Verification Needed]
  • Since this structure uses Gears and has no uses, besides being a cosmetic and situational light, it's unwise to build it more than once, though players might build these to show off material abundance.
  • Despite the Accomploshrine not being present in Don't Starve Together's console port, the cast still has quotes for the Accomploshrine and its related achievements.
    • Strangely, Wanda lacks her own quote for the Accomploshrine itself and instead uses Wilson's quote, despite having quotes for gaining the achievements.
  • The name of the two Accomploshrine achievements are a reference to Percy Bysshe Shelley's sonnet "Ozymandias", in which a broken statue with the inscription "My name is Ozymandias, king of kings: Look on my works, ye Mighty, and despair!" is found in an empty desert; all the king's work was ultimately meaningless, just like the Accomploshrine and its achievements.

Gallery

  • Unused version of Accomploshrine
  • Accomploshrine emoji from official Klei Discord server.
  • Accomploshrine Map Icon.


Craftable ItemsStructures

plainText:
Accomploshrine
"Prove your worth as a human being."
Object Info
Perk
A sense of accomplishment for those with nothing else to live for.
Crafting
×10 ×1 ×6
Tab
Tier
Miscellaneous
"accomplishment_shrine"
Exclusive to:
ExamineAccomplishAchievement
“I want to use it, and I want the world to know that I did.”
–Wilson, examining the Accomploshrine.
“I hate that arrow!”
–Willow, examining the Accomploshrine.
“I will defeat you, tiny arrow!”
–Wolfgang, examining the Accomploshrine.
“I've never much cared for metaphor.”
–Wendy, examining the Accomploshrine.
“I AM GOOD AT REPEATING TASKS”
–WX-78, examining the Accomploshrine.
“I feel a compulsive urge to activate it, again and again.”
–Wickerbottom, examining the Accomploshrine.
“It seems a bit show-offy to me.”
–Woodie, examining the Accomploshrine.
“Even They couldn't build something so devious.”
–Maxwell, examining the Accomploshrine.
“A puzzle! Let's hope it's a good one!”
–Wagstaff, examining the Accomploshrine.
“My victöries shall be remembered!”
–Wigfrid, examining the Accomploshrine.
“It gives me a goal in life.”
–Webber, examining the Accomploshrine.
“Well, that looks like a lot of busywork.”
–Walani, examining the Accomploshrine.
“I always wished to make a name for myself.”
–Warly, examining the Accomploshrine.
“Ye be knowin'th'glory of pirate Woodlegs, world!”
–Woodlegs, examining the Accomploshrine.
“WILBA HATH SENSE OF ACCOMPLISHMENT!”
–Wilba, examining the Accomploshrine.
“Pretty!”
–Wormwood, examining the Accomploshrine.
“Why would I do this? Because it's there.”
–Wheeler, examining the Accomploshrine.
“A testament to my achievements. Or lack of them.”
–Winona, examining the Accomploshrine.
“I did indeed do that!”
–Wortox, examining the Accomploshrine.
“Done so many things, florp!”
–Wurt, examining the Accomploshrine.
“I love checking tasks off a list!”
–Walter, examining the Accomploshrine.
“I feel so accomplished!”
–Wilson, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“Move, arrow! MOVE!”
–Willow, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“I am doing great things with tiny arrow!”
–Wolfgang, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“All of this is transient.”
–Wendy, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“WHY AM I DOING THIS?”
–WX-78, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“It's not there yet!”
–Wickerbottom, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“Lucy is going to be so proud of me!”
–Woodie, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“I need to pass the time somehow.”
–Maxwell, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“A game of some sort. Fascinating!”
–Wagstaff, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“May I return tö battle nöw?”
–Wigfrid, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“We're so capable!”
–Webber, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“Busywork.”
–Walani, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“I am triumphant!”
–Warly, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“Glory fer ol'Woodlegs!”
–Woodlegs, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“HARK! CHALLENGE FOR WILBA”
–Wilba, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“A game!”
–Wormwood, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“Well that looks interesting.”
–Wheeler, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“I can do ANYTHING!”
–Winona, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“I feel excellent about myself!”
–Wortox, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“Did it!”
–Wurt, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“I did it!”
–Walter, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“Ha! Success!”
–Wanda, cranking the Accomploshrine a 25th time.
“If only my friends could see me now...”
–Wilson, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“I DID IT!”
–Willow, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“I have defeated the tiny arrow!”
–Wolfgang, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“This will be forgotten too, some day.”
–Wendy, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“TASK COMPLETE”
–WX-78, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“File that under completed!”
–Wickerbottom, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“That's a wrap, eh!”
–Woodie, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“Ah. The satisfaction of a job well done.”
–Maxwell, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“Not quite the thrill I was anticipating.”
–Wagstaff, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“Victöry! Alright, let us away.”
–Wigfrid, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“We're a super hero!”
–Webber, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“Well, that's finished.”
–Walani, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“I hope this feeling lasts forever...”
–Warly, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“If only me shipmates could see me now!”
–Woodlegs, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“WILBA HAST DON'DED GOOD”
–Wilba, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“Did it! Yay!”
–Wormwood, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“A waste of time. Onto the next adventure!”
–Wheeler, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“Mitt me, kid!”
–Winona, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“I've done the thing!”
–Wortox, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“Did it!”
–Wurt, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“If I were back home, I'd get a badge for that!”
–Walter, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
“I think I've accomplished everything I needed to do.”
–Wanda, obtaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
The Accomploshrine is a craftable structure only available on the console versions of Don't Starve. It requires 10 Gold Nuggets, 1 Cut Stone, and 6 Gears to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
Willow attaining the "...and despair!" achievement.
The Accomploshrine's sole purpose is to grant two PSN/Xbox achievements. To attain the trophies, the player must first build the Accomploshrine to earn the "Look on my works, ye Mighty," achievement, then activate the Accomploshrine a total of 725 times within one game to earn the "...and despair!" achievement.
Each time the player turns the handle on the device, the cranking sound will play at a higher and higher pitch until the 25th crank. After every 25th activation, the shrine will release a firework with a similar light effect as Lightning, and the player's character will remark on their accomplishment. When the player obtains the "...and despair!" achievement, a bigger fireworks explosion, flags, and music will come out of the Accomploshrine, and the character will comment again on their achievement.

Klei did not want to add any sort of achievements for Don't Starve, but Sony required them to do so for the PS4 release. This item was added begrudgingly as a jab at the pointlessness of achievements.[Verification Needed]

Despite the Accomploshrine not being present in Don't Starve Together's console port, the cast still has quotes for the Accomploshrine and its related achievements.
Strangely, Wanda lacks her own quote for the Accomploshrine itself and instead uses Wilson's quote, despite having quotes for gaining the achievements.
The name of the two Accomploshrine achievements are a reference to Percy Bysshe Shelley's sonnet "Ozymandias", in which a broken statue with the inscription "My name is Ozymandias, king of kings: Look on my works, ye Mighty, and despair!" is found in an empty desert; all the king's work was ultimately meaningless, just like the Accomploshrine and its achievements.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Accomploshrine là một công trình có thể chế tạo được chỉ có trên phiên bản console của Don't Starve. Nó cần 10 Vàng Thỏi, 1 Đá Cắt và 6 Bánh Răng để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu.
title: Accomploshrine

Each time the player turns the handle on the device, the cranking sound will play at a higher and higher pitch until the 25th crank. After every 25th activation, the shrine will release a firework with a similar light effect as [[Lightning]], and the player's [[character]] will remark on their accomplishment. This item was added begrudgingly as a jab at the pointlessness of achievements.{{Cite}} *Since this structure uses Gears and has no uses, besides being a cosmetic and situational light, it's unwise to build it more than once, though players might build these to show off material abundance. *Despite the Accomploshrine not being present in ''Don't Starve Together'''s console port, the cast still has quotes for the Accomploshrine and its related achievements. **Strangely, Wanda lacks her own quote for the Accomploshrine itself and instead uses Wilson's quote, despite having quotes for gaining the achievements. *The name of the two Accomploshrine achievements are a reference to Percy Bysshe Shelley's sonnet "[[Wikipedia:Ozymandias|Ozymandias]]", in which a broken statue with the inscription "My name is Ozymandias, king of kings: Look on my works, ye Mighty, and despair!" is found in an empty desert; all the king's work was ultimately meaningless, just like the Accomploshrine and its achievements. == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Old Accomploshrine.png|Unused version of Accomploshrine Accomploshrine emoji from official Klei Discord server.png|Accomploshrine emoji from official Klei Discord server.
